full_text:
Zhong Yao (Yuanchang) 鍾繇 (元常)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhong Yao (鍾繇), styledYuanchang (元常), was born in Yingchuan. Famous calligrapher. Stirred up quarrel between Han Sui and Ma Teng, close to Cao Pi. Zhong Yao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Li Jue, and the Wei Kingdom. Zhong Yao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
